Product Description

Car Warning Triangle Reflective Emergency Safety Sign

A must-have emergency safety item for every car, truck, van, taxi, or commercial vehicle. This reflective warning triangle helps alert other drivers during breakdowns, roadside parking, tyre issues, or emergency situations.

SG Ready Stock | Ship Out Within 24 Hours

Key Features

High Reflective Visibility

Bright red reflective panels help improve visibility and remind approaching vehicles to slow down.

Emergency Roadside Safety

Suitable for car breakdowns, accident warning, road trips, night parking, and roadside emergencies.

Foldable & Portable Design

Easy to fold and store in your car boot without taking up much space.

Stable Triangle Stand

Designed with a tripod-style base to stand steadily on the road surface.

Suitable for Multiple Vehicles

Can be used for cars, trucks, vans, taxis, buses, commercial vehicles, and family vehicles.

Product Information

Product Name: Car Emergency Warning Triangle

Color: Red

Type: Reflective Safety Triangle

Design: Foldable / Portable

Use: Roadside Emergency Warning

Suitable Vehicle: Car, Truck, Van, Taxi, Bus, Commercial Vehicle

Package Includes: 1 × Reflective Warning Triangle

Why You Need It

When your vehicle breaks down or stops by the roadside, placing a warning triangle behind your vehicle can help alert other drivers earlier and reduce safety risks. It is a simple but important item to keep in your car for daily driving and long-distance travel.

Usage Tips

Park your vehicle safely and turn on hazard lights.

Open and set up the warning triangle.

Place it behind your vehicle at a safe distance.

Use it during breakdowns, accidents, or roadside emergencies.
